pr.title: Add animated pig running GIF
pr.body:
## Summary

Adds an animated GIF of a pig running, created from the user-provided pig image. The GIF features:
- 12 frames at 80ms per frame for smooth running animation
- Vertical bounce with squash/stretch to simulate running gait
- Slight body tilt for natural movement feel
- Dust particles on ground contact
- Motion lines behind the pig for speed effect
- 400x300 canvas size

Three new sprite assets added:
- `pigrun.gif` — main animated GIF with white background
- `pigrun_transparent.gif` — same animation with transparent background
- `pigrun_clean.png` — cleaned static PNG with background removed from the source image

The checkered transparency-pattern background from the source JPG was algorithmically removed using chroma/brightness thresholding with morphological cleanup.

![pigrun.gif](assets/sprites/pigrun.gif)

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human
- [ ] Open `pigrun.gif` and `pigrun_transparent.gif` in a browser to verify the animation plays smoothly and loops correctly
- [ ] Verify the pig edges look clean with no background artifacts
- [ ] Check that `pigrun_clean.png` has proper transparency (no leftover checkered pattern)

### Notes
- The GIF was generated programmatically using Pillow/NumPy (script not committed to repo)
- The original pig image was provided as a JPG with a checkered transparency background; the script detects and removes the checker pattern to isolate the pig


Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/d4bcb570e6a3493dbfdc64f359306e5e
Requested by: @Powerquest888
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
